reviews.comment:
10 cuadras de fila, un solo surtidor. Una vergüenza!!

(Translated by Google)
Ten blocks in line, only one pump. A disgrace!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y todos los servicios!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and all the services!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURONDZIUWlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente, creo que nadie tenga una experiencia buena en esta estación.
Todo el día colas, no se s muy buena la atención, nada que ver con las otras YPF del Partido.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, I don't think anyone will have a good experience at this station. There are lines all day, the service isn't very good, and it's nothing like the other YPF stations in the district.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURON2NUajVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
45 min para cargar, cuando llegue te dicen que NO hay infinia diesel. Por estar en reparación el surtidor.

(Translated by Google)
45 minutes to recharge, and when you arrive, they tell you there's no Infinia diesel. The pump is under repair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROMWRXUUhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los empleados. Mucha demora en cargar. Pocos surtidores disponibles para el caudal de vehículos. Las 2 veces que cargamos igual. Fila de 1 cuadra aprox. 15 vehículos en espera.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent customer service. Very long wait times at the pumps. Too few pumps available for the volume of vehicles. The same thing happened both times we filled up. The line was about a block long, with 15 vehicles waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROdWFINUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Hay un viejo q atiende. Tiene una mala ondaaa

(Translated by Google)
There's an old man who helps. He's got a bad vibe.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien, muchísima demora, una sola estación, ¿cómo puede ser?

(Translated by Google)
Very well, a huge delay, only one station, how can that be?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROcnVLdnBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una mala estación de servicio entre que hay una sola porque la otra la estan haciendo viene gente con bidones en mano y se salta a todas las personas que esperamos como media hora para llenar el tanque. Y no van con un bidón hacen varios viajes para llenar su tanque. Una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
It's a bad gas station, since there's only one because the other one is being built. People come with cans in hand and skip all the people who wait for about half an hour to fill up. And they don't carry a can; they make several trips to fill up. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURObXB1RXp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Está bien pero mucha espera ...el playero muy bien

(Translated by Google)
It's okay but a lot of waiting...the beach is very good
